## Meeting Purpose

[Executive interview with Jose Farias for a Full Stack Engineer (Product focus) position at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/kYzFWFy3VGcmMyvjK-KTC3wzT7hzpe-c?tab=summary&timestamp=298.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX combines a thriving content services business with ambitious plans to build a "content OS" platform](https://fathom.video/share/kYzFWFy3VGcmMyvjK-KTC3wzT7hzpe-c?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [The company has reached $10M in revenue within a year, with 70% gross margins and plans for significant growth](https://fathom.video/share/kYzFWFy3VGcmMyvjK-KTC3wzT7hzpe-c?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
  - [GrowthX is positioning itself to capitalize on the shift towards AI-driven content creation and marketing](https://fathom.video/share/kYzFWFy3VGcmMyvjK-KTC3wzT7hzpe-c?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
  - [The company is likely to raise $30-50M in funding to accelerate growth and product development](https://fathom.video/share/kYzFWFy3VGcmMyvjK-KTC3wzT7hzpe-c?tab=summary&timestamp=1967.0)

## Topics

### Business Model and Strategy

  - [GrowthX combines content services with platform development](https://fathom.video/share/kYzFWFy3VGcmMyvjK-KTC3wzT7hzpe-c?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [Services business brings in significant revenue ($200K avg. deal size)](https://fathom.video/share/kYzFWFy3VGcmMyvjK-KTC3wzT7hzpe-c?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)
  - [Building internal tools and platforms to augment and streamline services](https://fathom.video/share/kYzFWFy3VGcmMyvjK-KTC3wzT7hzpe-c?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
  - [Developing a "content OS" with potential for productization and open-sourcing](https://fathom.video/share/kYzFWFy3VGcmMyvjK-KTC3wzT7hzpe-c?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
  - [Addressing a massive market opportunity in content services ($500B/year)](https://fathom.video/share/kYzFWFy3VGcmMyvjK-KTC3wzT7hzpe-c?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)

### Growth and Financials

  - [Reached $10M in revenue in less than a year, mostly bootstrapped](https://fathom.video/share/kYzFWFy3VGcmMyvjK-KTC3wzT7hzpe-c?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
  - [70% gross margins, comparable to software businesses](https://fathom.video/share/kYzFWFy3VGcmMyvjK-KTC3wzT7hzpe-c?tab=summary&timestamp=594.0)
  - [Raised $12M earlier this year, with 50+ investors currently interested](https://fathom.video/share/kYzFWFy3VGcmMyvjK-KTC3wzT7hzpe-c?tab=summary&timestamp=957.0)
  - [Targeting $15M revenue by year-end and $45M next year](https://fathom.video/share/kYzFWFy3VGcmMyvjK-KTC3wzT7hzpe-c?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)

### Product Development Approach

  - [Building MVPs for internal use first, then potentially productizing](https://fathom.video/share/kYzFWFy3VGcmMyvjK-KTC3wzT7hzpe-c?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Rapid development and iteration (e.g., swapping out APIs over a weekend)](https://fathom.video/share/kYzFWFy3VGcmMyvjK-KTC3wzT7hzpe-c?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)
  - [Focus on creating tools with immediate product-market fit](https://fathom.video/share/kYzFWFy3VGcmMyvjK-KTC3wzT7hzpe-c?tab=summary&timestamp=1377.0)
  - [Leveraging AI and automation to enhance content creation and workflows](https://fathom.video/share/kYzFWFy3VGcmMyvjK-KTC3wzT7hzpe-c?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)

### Company Culture and Work Environment

  - [Remote-first with quarterly off-sites in San Francisco](https://fathom.video/share/kYzFWFy3VGcmMyvjK-KTC3wzT7hzpe-c?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)
  - [Emphasis on building new things and shipping to real users](https://fathom.video/share/kYzFWFy3VGcmMyvjK-KTC3wzT7hzpe-c?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)
  - [Three core principles: doing best work, inspiring others, accomplishing more than thought possible](https://fathom.video/share/kYzFWFy3VGcmMyvjK-KTC3wzT7hzpe-c?tab=summary&timestamp=2034.0)
  - [Fast-paced environment with minimal bureaucracy](https://fathom.video/share/kYzFWFy3VGcmMyvjK-KTC3wzT7hzpe-c?tab=summary&timestamp=1349.0)

### Future Plans and Funding

  - [Considering raising $30-50M in next funding round](https://fathom.video/share/kYzFWFy3VGcmMyvjK-KTC3wzT7hzpe-c?tab=summary&timestamp=1967.0)
  - [Plans to expand engineering team across seven development "lanes"](https://fathom.video/share/kYzFWFy3VGcmMyvjK-KTC3wzT7hzpe-c?tab=summary&timestamp=1747.0)
  - [Investing in marketing and sales for the first time (just hired first AE)](https://fathom.video/share/kYzFWFy3VGcmMyvjK-KTC3wzT7hzpe-c?tab=summary&timestamp=1929.0)
  - [Positioning to capitalize on market shifts towards AI-driven content](https://fathom.video/share/kYzFWFy3VGcmMyvjK-KTC3wzT7hzpe-c?tab=summary&timestamp=1461.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jose to consider the opportunity and potentially move forward with the hiring process](https://fathom.video/share/kYzFWFy3VGcmMyvjK-KTC3wzT7hzpe-c?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare offer if moving forward with Jose](https://fathom.video/share/kYzFWFy3VGcmMyvjK-KTC3wzT7hzpe-c?tab=summary&timestamp=2000.0)
  - [Jose can reach out to Marcel via WhatsApp for any additional questions or discussions](https://fathom.video/share/kYzFWFy3VGcmMyvjK-KTC3wzT7hzpe-c?tab=summary&timestamp=2141.0)
